git_head: 8e6f9bf Probe G900 six-nine half-turn witness demand
hypothesis: 06_09 demands a 180-style half-turn witness. This search tests explicit candidate maps in the existing support table.
reading: A supported fork-side half-turn counterpart candidate exists in the tested table. This does not admit closure for 06_09, but it identifies a supported 03_09-side shadow that can be inspected as a possible 180 witness form.

interpretation_boundary: This is a candidate-map search only.
A supported fork-side counterpart is not an admitted closure witness.
A 180 witness means finite orientation reversal or counterpart support, not physical rotation.
Passing this audit does not admit transport, channel, force, physics, GR, Maxwell, QCD, electroweak, or unification.
